artifacts.post_measurement_change: Older hashes are scoped under pre_review_series. The attested final series uses the reviewed harness, complete fixture manifest, reviewed Stage 29 binary, and strengthened current/cancellation validation.

source_reconstruction.reconstruct_measured_command: git checkout 510b8157d68a5c51d7b95883fe2a42a8a148afde && patch_file=$(mktemp "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/kakehashi-stage29-measured-to-reviewed.XXXXXX") && trap 'rm -f "$patch_file"' EXIT && git show e736b0e99f015a559a4d8f0539f51c3908c88f15:benches/profile/results/single_worker_stage29_measured_to_reviewed.patch > "$patch_file" && test "$(shasum -a 256 "$patch_file" | cut -d ' ' -f 1)" = f6bdfc57ee2e69bdee14e45b1fd9e1907953e0d985313009f3044487bb6a08a5 && git apply -R "$patch_file"

method.execution_command_template: KAKEHASHI_BENCH_DATA_DIR=<content-addressed-fixture>/kakehashi KAKEHASHI_TREE_WORKER_MODE=authoritative KAKEHASHI_TREE_WORKER_THREADS=8 KAKEHASHI_BENCH_BIN_A=<first> KAKEHASHI_BENCH_BIN_B=<second> KAKEHASHI_BENCH_ITERS=30 KAKEHASHI_BENCH_WARMUP=6 KAKEHASHI_BENCH_SCENARIOS=typing_delta,typing_burst,cancel_burst KAKEHASHI_BENCH_SAMPLES_FILE=<run.json> target/release/deps/semantic_tokens-08ebd8d8c816111c
method.summary_statistic: median of four paired percent deltas; an even-sized median averages its middle values
method.validation: Every delta/full response is reconstructed client-side and the tracked semantic token must equal the latest inserted prefix before its latency sample is accepted.

interpretation: The attested final series accepted all 1,200 timed responses only after verifying latest-edit token content; its cancellation subset additionally verified all 960 obsolete responses as RequestCancelled. Rust single-edit typing showed lower median latency in three of four pairs, while Rust burst and cancellation medians improved in all four. The median-of-pairs central deltas were -3.5%, -7.3%, and -9.9%, respectively. P95 values are retained descriptively but remain too sample-sensitive for a general tail guarantee. Markdown retained reusable discovery and serves as the inactive-path control.

post_review_validation.purpose: Confirm the admission-snapshot fix preserves the stable no-competition path measured in the main series.
post_review_validation.interpretation: Current-token validation passed for every response. Single-edit and burst medians were within 0.3%; other sign-changing deltas remain descriptive only.

validated_cancellation_series.purpose: Verify both attribution and final-source behavior: every obsolete request must return JSON-RPC -32800 and every final token set must match the latest edit before its sample is accepted.

summary.interpretation: All four paired medians favored Stage 29; p95 remains inconclusive because one pair regressed by 32.7%.

fixture_manifest.note: The manifest is authoritative for every parser, query, marker, lock, and catalog file, including injected languages.
